subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Almighty, Who is worthy and deserving of all glorification, Who, despite the turning away of kings and subjects alike, and the heedlessness of the divines, the jurists and the mystics [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقتدریرا لایق و سزا که مع اعراض ملوک و مملوک و اغماض علما و فقها و عرفا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @service to others; to the Cause of God
